node.title: Uber Aarhus L5A SSE Process Timeline & Interview Bar

article.title: Uber Aarhus L5A SSE Process Timeline & Interview Bar
article.content:
Hi everyone,

I recently completed a 60-minute coding phone screen for the Senior Software Engineer (L5A) with Uber Aarhus. The problem was around LeetCode Medium difficulty.

I had a few questions for anyone who has recently gone through the process:

How long does Uber Aarhus typically take to provide feedback after a coding screen?
If the round is a pass, how many days did it take for you to hear back from the recruiter?
What does the remainder of the process look like for L5A in Aarhus?
How does the difficulty/bar of the next DSA rounds compare with the initial coding screen?
Are the later coding rounds significantly harder, or is the expectation more around clean implementation, communication, and problem-solving depth?

Would appreciate any recent experiences from candidates who interviewed with the Aarhus team.
